title: Abyssal Corrupter
description: Face the terrifying Abyssal Corrupter — a multi-stage deep abyss boss that can be summoned via ritual altar in Minecraft 1.21.1 NeoForge.
body:
# Abyssal Corrupter
A terrifying multi-phase abyssal boss for Minecraft 1.21.1.
From the darkest depths of the endless void awakens an ancient horror — the Abyssal Corrupter. Summoned through a forbidden dark ritual at the Abyssal Altar, this colossal entity delivers an intense, cinematic multi-phase battle that grows deadlier with every stage.
As the fight progresses, the Corrupter becomes increasingly aggressive, unleashing overwhelming attacks, devastating area effects, and a suffocating atmosphere of dread. Every phase brings new dangers and escalating power, creating an unforgettable challenge even for veteran players.
Main Features
![mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7068ed64c12e5e23dea5247c35fccc1080e8305_0.webp)
Dramatic multi-phase boss battle with evolving mechanics
Powerful and visually spectacular abilities
Immersive dark ritual summoning system
Flexible customization for difficulty, effects, and behavior
Perfect for both singleplayer adventures and multiplayer servers
Creative mode spawn egg and admin commands for easy testing
![mobs2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e8516dd50c0e8b1a14039b536047edc9829102c_0.webp)
How to Summon
Build the Abyssal Altar and complete the dark ritual to awaken the Corrupter from the abyss.
Requirements

Minecraft 1.21.1

## 深渊侵蚀者
Minecraft 1.21.1 恐怖多阶段深渊 Boss。
从无尽虚空的最深处苏醒的古老恐怖——深渊侵蚀者。通过深渊召唤祭坛的禁忌黑暗仪式将其唤醒后，你将面对一场紧张刺激、极具压迫感的多阶段激战。
随着战斗推进，深渊侵蚀者会变得越来越狂暴，释放出毁灭性的攻击、覆盖大范围的恐怖效果，以及让人窒息的黑暗氛围。每个阶段都带来全新的危险和更强的力量，对老玩家来说也是一场真正的考验。
![mob](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7068ed64c12e5e23dea5247c35fccc1080e8305_0.webp)![规则宣读](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cdfe57543d823d2169f7889c6e7c1d32d352c4f_0.webp)
主要特性
震撼的多阶段 Boss 战斗（阶段不断进化）
强大且视觉震撼的技能与攻击
沉浸式的黑暗仪式召唤系统
灵活的难度、特效和行为自定义
适合单人冒险和多人服务器
创造模式刷怪蛋及管理员命令
![mobss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e8516dd50c0e8b1a14039b536047edc9829102c_0.webp)
如何召唤
建造深渊召唤祭坛并完成黑暗仪式，即可从深渊中唤醒这位恐怖存在。
环境要求

Minecraft 1.21.1
